# Nabil Thange - Full-Stack Developer & Creative Technologist

> Portfolio of Nabil Thange, a full-stack developer and creative technologist from Mumbai, India. Specializing in AI-powered web applications, generative AI, and immersive 3D experiences.

## About

- [Home](https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/home): Portfolio dashboard showcasing projects and skills
- [About](https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/about): Background, education at Saraswati College of Engineering, and expertise
- [Contact](https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/contact): Get in touch for freelance projects and collaborations

## Projects & Work

- [Gallery](https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/gallery): Portfolio of web development, AI, and creative projects
- [Blog](https://nabil-thange.vercel.app/blog): Technical articles on web development, AI, and software engineering

## Skills & Expertise

**Programming Languages:** Python, Java, C, JavaScript, TypeScript, SQL
**Web Development:** React, Next.js, Node.js, Three.js, Full-Stack Development
**AI & Machine Learning:** Generative AI, LLaMA, OpenAI, LangChain, Groq, Voice AI, Neural Networks, Random Forest
**Design & Creative:** UI/UX Design, Figma, Canva, AutoCAD, Blender, Framer, 3D Web Experiences
**Tools & Platforms:** Git, GitHub, Docker, Supabase, Microsoft SQL Server, Unity, Meta XR
**Development Approach:** No-Code/Low-Code, API Integration, Hackathon Development, Product Development

## Services

**Freelance Development:** Custom web applications, AI integration, full-stack solutions
**Location:** Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
**Availability:** Open for freelance projects and collaborations worldwide

## Education

**Saraswati College of Engineering, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai**
- Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering
- Focus on AI, Machine Learning, and Full-Stack Development
